title: the One Merge
manager: The v6 integration branch holds finished work that main can't see — vals, tapes, the M3 replayer, codegen — and every release to main widens the gap. One deliberate merge brings it all home as 6.0's feature payload and retires the dual-track branch model permanently, which is the standing toxicity this whole program exists to end. Done when the assembly branch equals main-union-v6 with a green full build and every hand-resolved file documented.
cs: worktree off main; `git merge origin/v6`; real conflicts expected only in `jssm.ts`/compiler/peg/`package.json` (take the 6.0.0 line); ALL generated artifacts resolve `--theirs` then `npm run build`; verify #773 merged to v6 first; delta-audit note per semantic resolution; escalate on divergent same-behavior edits. This is the payload landing that lets Tjssm-827 (M3) and Tjssm-921 (deno drop) close.
